mapper.select: SELECT id, business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", tax_id as "taxId", contact_email as "contactEmail", contact_phone as "contactPhone", address, rating, fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_returns as "totalReturns", avg_shipping_days as "avgShippingDays", commission_rate as "commissionRate", state_id as "stateId", created_time as "createdAt", active_date as "activeDate" FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT state_id as "stateId", count(*) as "totalOrders" FROM supplier GROUP BY state_id

SELECT id, business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", contact_email as "contactEmail", state_id as "stateId", created_time as "createdAt" FROM supplier WHERE state_id IN ('APPLIED', 'UNDER_REVIEW') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier WHERE state_id IN ('APPLIED', 'UNDER_REVIEW')

SELECT id, business_name as "businessName", rating, fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_orders as "totalOrders", state_id as "stateId" FROM supplier WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY rating DESC, fulfillment_rate DESC ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier WHERE state_id = 'ACTIVE'

SELECT id, business_name as "businessName", rating, fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_returns as "totalReturns", state_id as "stateId" FROM supplier WHERE (rating < 2.0 OR fulfillment_rate < 85.0) AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'ON_PROBATION') ${orderby} ${pagination}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier WHERE (rating < 2.0 OR fulfillment_rate < 85.0) AND state_id IN ('ACTIVE', 'ON_PROBATION')

SELECT id, user_id as "userId", business_name as "businessName", business_type as "businessType", tax_id as "taxId", bank_account_id as "bankAccountId", contact_email as "contactEmail", contact_phone as "contactPhone", address, rating, fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_returns as "totalReturns", avg_shipping_days as "avgShippingDays", commission_rate as "commissionRate", state_id as "stateId", created_time as "createdAt", active_date as "activeDate" FROM supplier WHERE user_id = #{userId}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier WHERE user_id = #{userId}

SELECT id, business_name as "businessName", rating, fulfillment_rate as "fulfillmentRate", total_orders as "totalOrders", total_returns as "totalReturns", avg_shipping_days as "avgShippingDays", commission_rate as "commissionRate" FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT count(*) FROM supplier WHERE id = #{id}
